name: Shobhaa De
quote:
New movie / series in the making : "The Cowards of Bollywood ". Multi -star cast featuring The 3 Idiots and more. Bollywood remains silent  as @wangchuksworld  withers away. Shame on you !!
I loved this pic i found on the internet. Forgive me if there's a copyright issue. His life is more important.
